priorityPages.title: UCAISM Global Initiative | Individual Sovereignty in the Age of AI
priorityPages.description: UCAISM Global Initiative is an independent research and public-education initiative founded by Chang-Gyu Kwag for individual sovereignty in the age of AI.

priorityPages.title: Research Library | UCAISM Global Initiative
priorityPages.description: Explore books, foundation papers, policy briefs, working papers, and research resources from UCAISM Global Initiative.

priorityPages.title: Foundation Papers | UCAISM Global Initiative
priorityPages.description: Foundation Papers from UCAISM Global Initiative develop the core architecture of UCAISM, individual sovereignty, and Intelligent Capitalism.

priorityPages.title: Policy Briefs | UCAISM Global Initiative
priorityPages.description: Policy Briefs translate UCAISM research into practical guidance for AI governance, platform reform, data sovereignty, and digital public infrastructure.

priorityPages.title: Working Papers | UCAISM Global Initiative
priorityPages.description: Working Papers from UCAISM Global Initiative present pre-publication research on UCAISM, AI governance, platform power, and Intelligent Capitalism.
